title: Surreal Studio Portrait
sourceTitle: Reference Surreal Lego Minifigure Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image surreal LEGO minifigure studio portrait for attached portrait photo before surreal LEGO minifigure transformation, preserving adult man from the attached photo with photorealistic oversized human head, detailed skin texture, and disheveled natural hair. Subject: adult man from the attached photo with photorealistic oversized human head, detailed skin texture, and disheveled natural hair becomes a photorealistic oversized human head attached to a tiny LEGO minifigure body, preserving the source facial identity, skin texture, natural hair, and playful expression logic. Scene: minimal studio background with pale mint to sky-blue gradient keeps the composition clean, absurd, fashionable, and toy-photography focused. Composition: one LEGO hand pulling back the lower lip to expose teeth in a playful chaotic expression; fixed low-angle close studio portrait with slight fisheye distortion, huge human head dominating the frame, tiny LEGO torso and limbs visible, and concentrated clean composition. Signature Elements: Preserved reference surreal lego minifigure transform source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Lego Body Style: classic LEGO torso, LEGO legs, LEGO arms, and tiny plastic minifigure proportions. Style: Surreal editorial toy photography blending over-detailed photoreal human head, glossy plastic LEGO body, direct flash, pastel studio color, modern Internet aesthetics, and collectible figure energy. Color Palette: Fixed pale mint to sky-blue gradient background, pastel studio tones, realistic skin tones, colorful LEGO plastic, bright flash highlights, and clean glossy shadows. Lighting: Bright direct flash lighting with clear shadows, glossy highlights on skin and plastic, crisp facial texture, and playful studio intensity. Camera: Spectacular low angle with slight fisheye distortion, close portrait scale, oversized face perspective, and clean studio framing. Materials: Create a surreal studio portrait of a man from an attached photo with a large-size photorealistic human head attached to the tiny body of a LEGO minifigure. remains visibly plastic with classic LEGO torso, LEGO legs, LEGO arms, toy joints, glossy surfaces, and strong contrast against the realistic human head. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
